Document:
# Small Guns
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Small%20Guns"/]
## Small Guns
Small Guns are the most common ranged weapons in the Wasteland. They are reliable, easy to maintain, and fed by the ammunition you are most likely to find or trade for.
Compact sidearms suited to close and medium range. Pistols are common, practical, and easy to carry every day.
[bold]Weapon[/bold] [bold]Caliber[/bold] [bold]Notes[/bold] [bold]10mm Pistol[/bold] 10mm Standard Wasteland sidearm. Very common. [bold]9mm Pistol[/bold] 9mm Lighter caliber. Easier to feed. [bold]10mm Pipe Pistol[/bold] 10mm Improvised construction. Less reliable than standard.
Revolvers are slower to reload than pistols, but they hit harder and are valued for their rugged simplicity.
[bold]Weapon[/bold] [bold]Caliber[/bold] [bold]Notes[/bold] [bold].44 Magnum Revolver[/bold] .44 Magnum High damage. Heavy stopping power. [bold]10mm Revolver[/bold] 10mm Common caliber in a revolver frame. [bold].45-70 Hunting Revolver[/bold] .45-70 Large bore. Powerful against armored targets.
Rifles cover most medium- and long-range engagements and are standard issue for many organized factions.
[bold]Weapon[/bold] [bold]Caliber[/bold] [bold]Notes[/bold] [bold]R91 Rifle[/bold] 5.56 Pre-war US military rifle. Reliable and accurate. [bold]Chinese Assault Rifle[/bold] 7.62 Pre-war Chinese military. Durable, slower fire rate. [bold]5.56 Carbine[/bold] 5.56 Shorter barrel, lighter weight. Close-to-medium range.
Shotguns deal massive damage at close range and are ideal for room clearing and hunting dangerous fauna.
[bold]Weapon[/bold] [bold]Notes[/bold] [bold]Double-Barrel Shotgun[/bold] Two shots before reload. Classic Wasteland weapon. [bold]Pump Shotgun[/bold] Pump-action. More shots per load than double-barrel. [bold]Sawed-Off Shotgun[/bold] Short barrel. Wide spread, very short effective range.
SMGs fire pistol-caliber rounds at high rates of fire. They excel in close quarters and settlement fighting.
[bold]Weapon[/bold] [bold]Caliber[/bold] [bold]Notes[/bold] [bold]10mm SMG[/bold] 10mm High rate of fire. Standard close-quarters weapon. [bold]12mm SMG[/bold] 12mm Heavier round, fewer shots per magazine.
Precision long-range weapons built for picking off targets before they can close the distance.
[bold]Weapon[/bold] [bold]Caliber[/bold] [bold]Notes[/bold] [bold]Hunting Sniper[/bold] .308 Standard precision rifle. Good balance of range and stopping power. [bold]Varmint Rifle[/bold] 5.56 Lighter caliber sniper. More available ammo. [bold].308 Lever Rifle[/bold] .308 Lever-action precision. Slower cycle, high damage.
